sidebar.availableAnywhereCopy: Close this window and keep dictating from the tray with {{hotkey}}.

onboarding.title: Get TypeFree ready before your first dictation.
onboarding.copy: Choose your interface language, allow microphone access, and finish setup once everything is ready.
onboarding.stepLanguageCopy: Traditional Chinese is the default, but you can switch languages here before entering the app.
onboarding.stepPermissionCopy: The app needs microphone permission before dictation can begin.
onboarding.stepReadyCopy: Once access is granted, the Finish button becomes available and future launches go straight to Home.
onboarding.permissionCopy: Allow microphone access first. After that, you can finish setup and start using TypeFree right away.
onboarding.permissionError: Microphone permission was not granted yet. Allow access and try again.

home.heroTitle: Speak naturally, write cleanly, and keep your setup close by.
home.heroCopy: Press <keycap>{{hotkey}}</keycap> once to start dictation anywhere, then press it again to stop. The bottom capsule stays visible while speech is transcribed, cleaned, and inserted.

latest.emptyCopy: Your last transcript and cleaned result will show up here after the first successful dictation.

feedback.title: Current desktop state
feedback.rawEmpty: Your next transcript will appear here.
feedback.cleanedEmpty: The inserted text will appear here after cleanup completes.

historyPage.title: Local dictation history
historyPage.copy: Saved only on this device. Copy or delete any entry whenever you like.
historyPage.emptyCopy: Finish one successful dictation and it will be stored here with the raw and cleaned versions.

dictionaryPage.title: Dictionary
dictionaryPage.copy: Add the words and phrases you say often so Google Speech is more likely to recognize them correctly.
dictionaryPage.wordsDesc: Add one word or phrase at a time.
dictionaryPage.emptyCopy: Add your first common word to help Google Speech recognize it more accurately.
dictionaryPage.duplicateError: This word is already in your dictionary.
dictionaryPage.requiredError: Enter a word or phrase first.

settingPage.title: Settings
settingPage.speechProviderDesc: Choose which speech-to-text provider handles your dictation audio.
settingPage.llmProviderDesc: Choose which provider cleans transcripts before insertion.
settingPage.openrouterApiKeyDesc: Your OpenRouter API key for cloud-based cleanup.
settingPage.openrouterModelDesc: The model used for transcript cleanup via OpenRouter.
settingPage.ollamaBaseUrlDesc: The URL of your local Ollama instance.
settingPage.ollamaModelDesc: The local model used for transcript cleanup.
settingPage.googleApiKeyDesc: Your Google Cloud Speech-to-Text API key.
settingPage.sourceLanguageDesc: The language you will be dictating in.
settingPage.phraseHintsDesc: Add words or phrases you often say, one per line, so Google Speech is more likely to recognize them.
settingPage.phraseHintsPlaceholder:
e.g. invoice
Hong Kong ID
Chan Tai Man
settingPage.globalHotkeyDesc: Click the shortcut box, then press a single key or key combination to start and stop dictation.
settingPage.launchOnStartupDesc: Start TypeFree automatically when Windows starts and open the main window.
settingPage.hotkeyInvalid: Use a non-modifier key such as F8, D, or Ctrl+`.
settingPage.historyRetentionDesc: How long dictation history stays on this device.
settingPage.enableCleanupDesc: Apply light LLM cleanup before inserting text.

messages.failedLoad: Failed to load local app data.
messages.failedHotkey: Failed to subscribe to global hotkey events.
messages.micFailed: Microphone access failed. Check desktop and browser permissions.
